items.name: Yellow G Small Punk Shoulder Bag
items.description:
The G Punk Chain Small Shoulder Bag is crafted in a streamlined silhouette from smooth premium leather accented by shiny silver hardware. It has a classic-chic look made bolder by spike embellishment, a chain shoulder strap and a large turn-lock closure.

Made in partnership with Builder_Boy

items.name: Blackstone RN-0 Recon Helmet
items.description:
The recon variant of the RN-0 Power Armor helmet. Comes with integrated infrared, UV and night vision for all kinds of special operations that require a scalpel rather than a hammer.

Comes with the baseline energy blade horns as well of course and looks cool.
